description: Use this skill when the scheduled @raulinvests X/Twitter research, reply, quote-repost, or live AI-topic engagement workflow needs to gather feed/search signals, avoid duplicate angles, use hook-library, post only with browser automation, avoid em dashes, log every action, and close the browser.
